title: Trimmable Bows
description: Allow players to trim bows in minecraft!
body:
## Trimmable Bows

This Datapacks adds ability to trim bows in 1.20+. a feature which doesn't exist in vanilla game.

Just get any smithing template and your favorite material to get 1 of different bow variants!

The Resource pack is **required** for the datapack to work. there is also a mod version if you are interested in using that.
